blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 12 ft. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
